pages.title: Maid Leveling Altar
pages.text: The Maid Leveling Altar is a special device required for vampire maids to advance their level.$(br2)The multi-block structure is $(bold)identical$() to the player vampire leveling altar. Simply replace the center $(bold)vampirism:altar_infusion$() with the $(bold)Maid Leveling Altar$() block.

pages.title: Material Requirements
pages.text: The following materials and structure point requirements are needed for each level advancement:$(br2)$(bold)Level 1 → 2:$()$(li)Pure Blood (Level 2) ×10$(li)Human Heart ×10$(li)Vampire Book ×1$(li)Structure Points ≥ 18$(br2)$(bold)Level 2 → 3:$()$(li)Pure Blood (Level 2) ×15$(li)Human Heart ×20$(li)Vampire Book ×1$(li)Structure Points ≥ 26$(br2)$(bold)Level 3 → 4:$()$(li)Pure Blood (Level 3) ×20$(li)Human Heart ×30$(li)Vampire Book ×1$(li)Structure Points ≥ 35$(br2)$(bold)Level 4 → 5:$()$(li)Pure Blood (Level 4) ×25$(li)Human Heart ×40$(li)Vampire Book ×1$(li)Structure Points ≥ 44

pages.title: Ritual Procedure
pages.text: Follow these steps to perform the leveling ritual:$(br2)$(li)Place all required materials into the altar slots.$(li)Ensure the target $(bold)vampire maid$() is within $(bold)3 blocks$() of the altar.$(li)Click the $(bold)Start Ritual$() button in the altar interface.$(br2)$(italic)Note: The ritual can only be performed at $(bold)night$().$() If it is daytime, the ritual will not start.$(br2)Once the ritual begins, the maid will absorb energy from the altar and complete her level advancement, consuming all placed materials.
